title: Exercises: Reliability Engineering for Quantum Systems

exercises.title: Design Quantum SLOs
exercises.description: Design a comprehensive SLO framework for a quantum chemistry application.
tasks: Define 5 SLOs covering availability, latency, quality, and throughput
Calculate appropriate error budgets for a 30-day period
Implement measurement recording and budget tracking
Create a status report showing SLO performance
Add an alert when error budget drops below 25%
exercises.expectedOutput: QuantumSLOManager configured with chemistry-specific SLOs and working budget tracking
hints: Chemistry applications need high accuracy SLOs
Consider energy calculation precision as a quality metric
VQE convergence time is a good latency metric

exercises.title: Implement Adaptive Circuit Breaker
exercises.description: Create a circuit breaker that adapts its thresholds based on observed error patterns.
tasks: Extend QuantumCircuitBreaker to track error patterns over time
Implement dynamic threshold adjustment based on recent error rates
Add support for different backends having different thresholds
Create a learning mode that observes normal behavior baseline
Implement automatic recovery testing with gradual traffic increase
exercises.expectedOutput: AdaptiveCircuitBreaker with dynamic thresholds and learning capabilities
hints: Use a sliding window of recent calls for pattern detection
Start conservative and relax thresholds as confidence grows
Consider time-of-day patterns in quantum backend performance

exercises.title: Build Degradation Controller
exercises.description: Implement a degradation controller that manages feature availability based on system health.
tasks: Define 5 degradation levels with specific feature sets
Create trigger conditions based on realistic metrics
Implement automatic level transitions with hysteresis
Add manual override capability for operators
Generate degradation status dashboard output
exercises.expectedOutput: GracefulDegradationManager with automatic and manual controls
hints: Include a minimum time at each level before transitioning
Manual overrides should be logged for audit

exercises.title: Quantum Chaos Engineering
exercises.description: Design a chaos engineering experiment for testing quantum application reliability.
tasks: Define 3 chaos experiments targeting quantum-specific failures
Specify the steady-state hypothesis for each experiment
Design the fault injection mechanism
Create a rollback procedure for each experiment
Document expected vs actual behavior analysis
exercises.expectedOutput: Chaos engineering experiment plan document with detailed procedures
hints: Consider injecting calibration drift, queue delays, and result quality degradation
Start with small blast radius experiments
Always have a quick abort mechanism
